explanation: The user instructs to turn off the toaster and take out the slice. The toaster is currently toggled on (as per the state), so I must first turn it off using Toggle_off(toaster_0). The slice (breadsliced_0) is currently on top of the toaster, so I need to pick it up after turning off the toaster. Since the robot can only hold one object at a time, I first turn off the toaster and then pick up the slice. The plan follows the correct sequence of actions based on the current state and the user's instruction.
